title: STEM OPT Extension
description: 24-month extension of post-completion OPT for STEM degree holders.

timeline.description: Earliest you can apply for STEM OPT extension
Must file before current OPT expires
Receive new EAD card with 24-month extension
STEM OPT extension duration (total 36 months with initial OPT)

checklist: Confirm your degree is on the STEM Designated Degree Program list
Secure employment with an E-Verify registered employer
Complete Form I-983 (Training Plan) with employer
Request DSO recommendation for STEM extension in SEVIS
Complete Form I-765 with STEM OPT extension category
File application with USCIS before OPT expiration
Submit 6-month and 12-month I-983 evaluations to DSO
requirements: Hold a bachelor's, master's, or doctoral degree in a STEM field
Currently in a valid post-completion OPT period
Employer must be enrolled in E-Verify
Must have a formal training plan (Form I-983) signed by employer
Cannot exceed 150 days of unemployment during 24-month extension
Must report to DSO every 6 months
